docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-14-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SINADA, ZAKI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT OFFICE DEPOT RICK WOODYARD PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO PICK UP HIS COMPUTER FOR OVER A YEAR PRECLUDES HIM FROM RECOVERY FOR ITS LOSS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT OFFICE DEPOT RICK WOODYARD
REMARK: RETURN MAIL - NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO PLAINTIF, UNABLE TO FORWARD
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF SINADA, ZAKI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-14-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-14-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF ZAKI SINADA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT OFFICE DEPOT IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JARROD JANOSA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY SINADA, ZAKI AS TO DEFENDANT OFFICE DEPOT RICK WOODYARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-14-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
